mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warehouse_item (name, type, model, total_quantity, available_quantity, damaged_quantity, deposit_amount, description, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{model}, #{totalQuantity}, #{availableQuantity}, #{damagedQuantity}, #{depositAmount}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE warehouse_item SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, model = #{model}, total_quantity = #{totalQuantity}, available_quantity = #{availableQuantity}, damaged_quantity = #{damagedQuantity}, deposit_amount = #{depositAmount}, description = #{description}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, type, model, total_quantity, available_quantity, damaged_quantity, deposit_amount, description, create_time, update_time FROM warehouse_item WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM warehouse_item
AND type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{type}, '%')
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND available_quantity > 0

SELECT id, name, type, model, total_quantity, available_quantity, damaged_quantity, deposit_amount, description, create_time, update_time FROM warehouse_item
AND type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{type}, '%')
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND available_quantity > 0
ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
